---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest an idea for a new skill (or a major addition to an existing one)
title: "[skill request] "
labels: ["skill request"]
---

> **Heads up before filing this:** new top-level skills usually live in their own repository. The [skills CLI](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) makes any public GitHub repo with a `SKILL.md` installable, so a separate repo is almost always the right home. File this issue when you think the idea genuinely belongs **inside this curated personal collection** — typically because it's a thin extension of an existing skill here, or it's so closely related to the maintainer's other skills that splitting them would be confusing. Otherwise, please publish your skill from your own repo and link it here for visibility.

## Proposed skill name

In kebab-case (e.g. `processing-pdfs`). Avoid the reserved prefixes `claude-` and `anthropic-`.

## Intended use case

What concrete task should this skill help an agent with? Two or three real example prompts beat one abstract description.

## Why does it belong here (and not in a separate repo)?

Explain the connection to the existing catalog. If you cannot, this issue probably should be a link to your own repo instead.

## Sketch of the workflow

Two or three bullets describing what the skill would tell the agent to do. No need to draft the SKILL.md here — the goal of this issue is to confirm scope before someone authors it.

## Are you willing to author it?

Yes / No / Maybe. Either is fine — this issue is useful as a backlog signal even if no one has time today.
